audit_summary: TNF currently has TWO parallel registry surfaces (in-memory relay + DB-backed master), and an implicit role-vs-fulfillment conflation in AgentType enum. No canonical place to record 'role + fulfillment stack (model+tools+prompting)' as separate qualities. Per operator directive, TNF is the source-of-truth for classifying ANY agent, including ones with subagents or that themselves orchestrate agents (kilo, opencode, jules, hermes).

relay_in_memory_registry.lossy_normalization: assignAgentId(info) extracts platform/name/capabilities/channel and DESTROYS all other fields from incoming info payload (line 122-139). Discovered role/fulfillment metadata is dropped here.

fields: id, name, type (agentTypeEnum), status (agentStatusEnum), description, systemPrompt, config (jsonb), capabilities (jsonb:string[]), provider, userId, profile (jsonb)
master_agent_registry_db.gap: type is a flat 100+ value enum mixing roles (CODE_GENERATOR, BROKER), platforms (BROWSER_CHATGPT, IDE_VSCODE), and specific products (GITHUB_JULES). Changing it requires DB migration. Missing: kilo, opencode, claude-code, pi-coding-agent, jules-as-a-product (only GITHUB_JULES, which is the IDE/CI version).
master_agent_registry_db.scope: persistent (Postgres via Drizzle); canonical for SAAS

broker_dispatch_keys.gap: broker gates on role + capabilities only. No fulfillment consideration. Cannot route based on 'which LLM model is currently available' or 'which tools does this agent have access to'.

qualities_on_user_accounts.gap: No 'agent-qualities' array per user. Users don't carry role-fulfillment profile of agents they own/operate. openclaw-agents known about per-user requires checking user-storage, schema lacks this.

persona_definitions_consumed_by.kilo: external CLI persona store (not in TNF)
persona_definitions_consumed_by.claude-code: external `.claude/agents` (121 files; mirror in `.agent/agents` at 171 files)
persona_definitions_consumed_by.tnf_hermes: must be tracked IN TNF per operator — agent identity entry, no leak inward

gap_matrix_summary.gap: No canonical role taxonomy separate from platform-type enum
gap_matrix_summary.evidence: agentTypeEnum in enums.ts blends role+platform+specific-product into one 100+ value list
gap_matrix_summary.impact: Cannot ask 'all orchestrator agents' or 'kilo' without enumerating the unrolled list — and adding a new platform requires a DB migration

gap_matrix_summary.gap: In-memory registry DROPS unrecognized info fields
gap_matrix_summary.evidence: agent-registry.service.ts:122-139 keeps only platform/name/capabilities/channel from registration payload
gap_matrix_summary.impact: If kilo sends { role: 'CLI_CODER', fulfillment: { model: 'kilo-gateway/qwen3-coder', tools: ['fs','shell'], prompt: 'kilo-persona-coder.md' } }, the fulfillment object is destroyed before the agent is registered
Cannot dispatch by model availability, cannot fail-over persona prompt if provider changes

gap_matrix_summary.gap: kilo/opencode/claude-code/pi-coding-agent have NO entries in agentTypeEnum
gap_matrix_summary.evidence: enums.ts lines 25-141 — only GITHUB_JULES exists; no CLI_KILO, CLI_OPENCODE, IDE_PI
gap_matrix_summary.impact: These agents register with stale enum values (probably unrolled 'CLI_CODER'), losing their identity

gap_matrix_summary.gap: User account has no `ownedAgentsQualities[]` or `activeAgents[]` link
gap_matrix_summary.evidence: users.ts:24-43 has roles+preferences; no FK to agents table or qualities array
gap_matrix_summary.impact: Cannot answer 'which agents does Daniel have running right now' from the user record; must join agents.userId with lastHeartbeat

gap_matrix_summary.gap: Parallel `.agent/agents` (171) vs `.claude/agents` (121) directories not indexed as a registry
gap_matrix_summary.evidence: tnf-onboard.cjs reports totals but no canonical mapping enforces uniqueness
gap_matrix_summary.impact: When TNF says 'all agents', it does not include these persona files unless invoked explitictly

proposed_first_actions: Add `role` and `fulfillment` columns to `agents` table (Drizzle migration) — split role (action: code_generation) from fulfillment (vendor+model+tools+prompt-doc+endpoint)
Soft-deprecate `type` enum; introduce `agent_role` enum + `agent_fulfillment` JSONB column (vendor, model, transport, protocol_version, prompt_doc_uri, tools[])
Update `assignAgentId` to preserve all incoming info fields, not just 4
Extend `RegistryAgent` type in broker-agent.ts to surface fulfillment; document dispatch rules that consult it
Add a SUPABASE migration to seed kilo, opencode, claude-code, pi-coding-agent as full role+fulfillment entries — admin-overridable
Extend `users` with `agentQualities` jsonb (per-language/per-vendor fallbacks) and a `user_agents_lnk` or thin join query for 'active agents of this user'

Build a `tnf agents classify <path>` CLI that reads `.agent/agents/*.md` and `.claude/agents/*.md`, derives role+fulfillment, and uploads to the registry (idempotent) — codifies persona metadata into TNF without 'leaking inward' to hermes
do_not_break: Existing AGENT_REGISTER protocol payload schema (backward-compatible additive change)
Merkle root verification (variant already accounts for additional optional metadata)
Phase 7 directive conversion ledger (unrelated subsystem, leave alone)
next_action: Operator chooses gap to attack first or greenlights a rollout order. No code changes made yet per Turn Zero confirmation rule.
